name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that is divisive, discriminatory, and factually inaccurate. He has repeatedly expressed disdain for childless individuals, women, and marginalized groups, often using derogatory language and promoting false narratives. Vance has also shown a willingness to spread misinformation and create false stories to further his own agenda, as evidenced by his claims about Haitian migrants and his defense of those claims despite being debunked. Additionally, his nonprofit organization, Our Ohio Renewal, has been criticized for its excessive overhead costs and lack of effective programming, suggesting a mismanagement of resources. Vance's actions and statements reveal a character that is more focused on promoting ideology and personal interests than on serving the public good.

entries.fact: JD Vance complained about 'highly educated transplants' in Silicon Valley in a New York Times op-ed.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, spent more on 'management services' than on programs to fight opioid abuse in its first year.
Our Ohio Renewal sent psychiatrist Sally Satel to Ohio's Appalachian region for a yearlong residency, which was 'tainted' by ties between Satel, her employer, and Purdue Pharma.
JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'
JD Vance said that childless teachers were 'trying to brainwash the minds of our children' and criticized American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
JD Vance opposes abortion, including in cases of rape.
Our Ohio Renewal raised around $221,000 in 2017, but spent most of its revenue on overhead costs and travel, and raised less than $50,000 in subsequent years.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance proposed a federal ban on gender-transition care for minors.
JD Vance and Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said that parents should have more voting power than non-parents, but later backtracked from this suggestion.
JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' because 'she wants to yell at Donald Trump because he showed up' at Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said 'Don't do this fake outrage thing' in response to criticism of Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery

JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing 'to create stories so that the American media actually pays attention ... we're creating a story, meaning we're creating the American media focusing on it'

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'
JD Vance said that 'a child was murdered by a Haitian migrant who had no right to be here', despite the child's death being an accidental collision between vehicles

JD Vance objected to fact-checking during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the rules were that the moderators would not fact-check, and claimed that Haitian immigrants in Springfield, Ohio should not be considered legal because the federal government decided their protected status after they had arrived in the United States
JD Vance wrote that 'judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power' after multiple federal judges issued temporary rulings against various Trump administration actions

JD Vance declared 'ideological war' on Europe in a speech at the Munich Security Conference, stating that 'the threat from within' was his biggest concern for European security, rather than Russia or China.

JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that 'the path to peace and the path to prosperity is maybe engaging in diplomacy' during a meeting at the White House, and later accused Zelenskyy of showing a 'propaganda tour' of Ukraine.

JD Vance incorrectly claimed that Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy had campaigned for the opposition in Pennsylvania in October 2024, when in fact Zelenskyy had visited a factory to thank workers producing ammunition for Ukraine.

JD Vance said 'We can't just ignore the president's desires' for the US to acquire Greenland, and warned that Greenland faced the 'encroachment of powerful countries' China and Russia 'as they expand their ambitions'

JD Vance lamented that the 'globalist economy' had caused the United States to 'borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture', and also referred to Chinese people as 'peasants'

JD Vance would not have certified the 2020 presidential election results if he had been vice president, and instead suggested that some states Trump lost should have sent pro-Trump electors to Washington so that Congress could decide the election.
JD Vance argued for a higher tax rate on childless Americans in a 2021 interview
JD Vance argued that the country's largest and most powerful institutions have united against the right and called for 'a de-woke-ification program' even if the courts say it is illegal.
JD Vance expressed a belief that childlessness is linked to sociopathy.
JD Vance made a comment referring to some women as 'childless cat ladies', sparking widespread criticism
JD Vance defended his 'childless cat ladies' comment, describing it as 'sarcastic'
JD Vance stated that 'childless people' in US leadership are 'more sociopathic'
JD Vance bashed a teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children
JD Vance told Kamala Harris to 'go to hell' for criticism she did not actually make
JD Vance pushed false accusations of Haitians eating pets
JD Vance said a false claim he spread against Haitian migrants may not be true but urged followers to keep posting 'cat memes'
JD Vance shared a social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, which the city refuted
JD Vance stuck by his pet-eating claims and said he's willing to 'create stories'
